text.title: Insight to Design Ticket Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a design-backlog ticket. Subagent must satisfy this before queueing.

field.name: direction_suggested
field.constraint: NOT prescriptive (no specific UI elements named) — describes hypothesis space

field.name: ice_score
field.constraint: impact between 1 and 10; confidence between 1 and 10; ease between 1 and 10

field.name: acceptance
field.constraint: references designer output AND evidence-fit recheck

forbidden.pattern: More than one insight in a single ticket (violates r1)
evidence array length < 2 OR any evidence missing source_id (violates r2)
direction_suggested containing specific UI elements (button, modal, dropdown) or specific tech (Tailwind, MUI) — that's a solution, not a direction (violates r3)
ice_score missing OR rationale field empty (violates r4)
status == queued past loss_horizon_date without retire_candidate tag (violates r5)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Re-validate a retire_candidate ticket by attaching new evidence with fresh ICE score; resets loss_horizon_date.
Promote a ticket to "experiment" status (linked to growth-experiment-design methodology) when the hypothesis becomes testable.
Add a "decision_link" field after design completes, pointing to the chosen direction's spec.

list.item: Exactly one insight in the ticket
Researcher AND PM both signed (different people)
